sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 66:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 66:1
items.html: The refinement of the screen from the phase of coarseness in the vessel causes the cancelation of the vessel because it is unfit to receive any light when it lacks a screen. Also, the return of the light of Keter, as it was in the first expansion, causes the cancelation of the vessels, because the vessels mix with the lights. (Inner Light, Item‎ 5)
